scripts.dev: cd packages/collectionloom && npm run tauri dev
scripts.dev:collectionloom: cd packages/collectionloom && npm run tauri dev
scripts.build: npm run download-tools && cd packages/collectionloom && npm run tauri build
scripts.build:install: npm run download-tools && cd packages/collectionloom && npm run build:install
scripts.build:portable: npm run download-tools && cd packages/collectionloom && npm run build:portable
scripts.test:all: cd packages/core && cargo test && cd ../collectionloom/src-tauri && cargo test
scripts.screenshots: node scripts/prepare-screenshot-data.mjs && cd packages/collectionloom && VITE_FIXTURE_MODE=1 npm run build && node ../../scripts/capture-screenshots.mjs
